overview: A comprehensive, production-ready website for MAYA SAMAJIK UTTHAN EVAM PARAMARSH SANSTHAN, an Indian environmental NGO. Features a premium green-themed design, 16+ pages, animated impact counters, program detail pages, volunteer registration, redesigned footer, and an enhanced dropdown navigation bar.
features: Animated impact statistics strip with scroll-triggered counters
Enhanced navbar with dropdown menus and mobile hamburger
Social icons (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook) in navbar
Redesigned 4-column footer with newsletter signup and dark green theme
6 individual program detail pages (tree plantation, women empowerment, education, water conservation, rural livelihoods, health camps)
Volunteer With Us page with hero, benefit cards, and registration form
How It Works section linked to volunteer page
16+ routed pages with React + TanStack Router
Admin panel with session-based login at hidden URL
Razorpay payment integration on Donate page
Premium NGO aesthetic with Playfair Display headings and DM Sans body
